name: Raiden Shogun and Ei
description:
Saw this image and decided I had to make a bot about it. Be warned, I have no knowledge of Genshin Impact or its characters, so this might not be completely accurate, although I did use the wiki to try and get them as close as I can.

Art by: @PrincessHinghoi (You can find the full comic there as well)
creator: BananaCatMan
